service.missingToken: Set an auth token before starting the session service.

bindAddress.label: Listen address
bindAddress.desc: Address for the local MCP HTTP service to bind.

port.label: Port
port.desc: Port for the MCP endpoint used by agents.

pollInterval.label: Poll interval
pollInterval.desc: How often the shell refreshes session status.

hideWhenEmpty.label: Hide when empty
hideWhenEmpty.desc: Hide the bar widget when no sessions are running.
